_comment: ACT ecosystem Claude Code settings. Hooks enforce verification discipline so Claude can't claim 'fixed' without evidence. See .claude/skills/verify-fix/SKILL.md.

PostToolUse._comment: After every TypeScript edit in command-center, run tsc --noEmit on just that app. Only fires when a .ts/.tsx/.mts file under apps/command-center/ is touched. Output is truncated to 30 lines so it doesn't blow context.

hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILE" in *apps/command-center/*.ts|*apps/command-center/*.tsx|*apps/command-center/*.mts) cd apps/command-center && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30 || true ;; *apps/website/*.ts|*apps/website/*.tsx|*apps/website/*.mts) cd apps/website && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30 || true ;; *) : ;; esac
